extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Action Center on the Inbox page with a pending human-in-the-loop task opened for an escalated incident categorization request. The left panel lists tasks and filters, while the main panel displays an Action App form titled "Assistance required to categorize ServiceNow incident INC0147569." The form shows the incident short description and description, the agent's output explaining it could not confidently categorize the incident, and empty Category and Subcategory dropdowns for a human reviewer.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Action Center Inbox, open the pending task "Categorization request #7853024" if it is not already selected.
2. Review the incident details in the Short Description and Description fields.
3. Review the Agent Output message explaining why escalation was triggered.
4. Select a value from the Category dropdown.
5. Select a value from the Subcategory dropdown.
6. Click on "Submit" to complete the categorization task, or click "Stop agent execution" if the process should be terminated.
